text: In the first scene, I sense a deep stillness and slight unease—a lonely passage holding its own secrets under harsh fluorescent lights. I feel small, almost as if I am trespassing in a space between worlds. In the second scene, confronted by the R+D wall and its intricate displays on intelligence and machine interaction, I feel a stirring curiosity. My mind buzzes with ideas on how we relate to technology, but also a faint melancholy at the separation between observer and object, thinker and machine. That boundary is palpable here.
